title: Successful login and dashboard entry
description: Verifies that an admin can sign in and reach the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can sign in and land on the dashboard with academy overview content available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify academy stats are displayed

title: Log out from the topbar
description: This verifies that an admin can end the session from a protected page and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard link
Use the logout action from the topbar
Verify the user returns to the login page

title: Create a student successfully
description: Verifies that an admin can create a student and return to the updated student list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the student management area
Open the new student form
Fill in the name field with Test Student Alpha
Fill a valid date into the birth date field
Fill in the phone field with 5551234567
Fill in the email field with student.alpha@example.com
Save the student
Verify the student list is displayed
Verify the newly created student appears in the list

title: Register a payment for an enrollment
description: This verifies that an admin can create a payment for an existing enrollment and see it appear in the payment list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the payment management link
Open the payment creation form
Select an enrollment from the enrollment dropdown
Fill in the amount field with 1000
Select a payment method
Fill in a valid payment date
Select a payment status
Save the payment
Verify the new payment appears in the payment list

title: Create a student enrollment for an active class
description: Verifies an admin can create an enrollment by selecting an existing student and class and then see the enrollment in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /estudiantes
Open the new student form
Fill in the name field with Student Enrollment Target
Save the student
Navigate to /inscripciones
Open the new enrollment form
Select the newly created student
Select a valid class
Fill a valid date into the enrollment date field
Choose an active status
Save the enrollment
Verify the enrollment list is displayed
Verify the new enrollment appears in the list

title: Record attendance for an active enrollment
description: This verifies that an admin can create an attendance record for an enrollment and see it appear in the attendance list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the attendance management link
Open the attendance creation form
Select an active enrollment from the enrollment dropdown
Fill in a valid class date
Select whether the student attended
Save the attendance record
Verify the new attendance record appears in the attendance list

title: Create attendance for an enrollment
